title: cola sciaphila
intro: Cola sciaphila is a species of flowering plant in the family Sterculiaceae, native to tropical Africa. It is also known as the cola nut tree, due to its resemblance to the Cola acuminata tree, which produces the cola nut. The medicinal properties of Cola sciaphila include its stimulant and expectorant effects, which are attributed to the presence of caffeine and other alkaloids. The herbal preparations of Cola sciaphila, such as decoctions and infusions, are used to alleviate respiratory issues and provide relief from coughs and bronchitis, while also being used to boost energy and improve mental focus.
